name: Eyes Drop
author: Poki
description: Eyes Drop is a merge game with a spooky twist! Drop different sizes of eyeballs strategically and watch as two matching ones merge into a bigger, cooler eyeball. The bigger the eyeball, the higher your score! Plan your drops, aim carefully, and keep merging to create the ultimate eye. How big can your eyeball grow? How to play Eyes Drop? Move your item with the mouse and click to drop it!. Who created Eyes Drop? Eyes Drop is created by Ploopica. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Eyes Drop for free? You can play Eyes Drop for free on Poki. Can I play Eyes Drop on mobile devices and desktop? Eyes Drop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
